mapper.select:
SELECT a.announce_id, a.title, a.reqst_end_date,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM document d WHERE d.announce_id = a.announce_id) AS total_docs,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member_document_check mdc JOIN document d2 ON mdc.document_id = d2.document_id WHERE d2.announce_id = a.announce_id AND mdc.member_id = f.member_id AND mdc.checked= true )AS checked_docs
FROM member_favorite f JOIN announce a ON f.announce_id = a.announce_id WHERE f.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY a.created_date DESC
